claim_boundary: Interface scaffold only. No BHSM q0^2 value, Wilson coefficients, form factors, physical q^2 bridge, or micro-plateau nodes are derived.

convention_metadata.complex_part_operation: explicit real-part operation required where amplitudes are complex
domain_assumptions: q^2 lies in a physical analysis domain supplied externally
D_FB(q^2) must be nonzero before a zero crossing is meaningful
convention_metadata.scale_dependence: mu slot required for Wilson/effective coefficients
singularity_conditions: D_FB(q0^2)=0 invalidates the normalized zero-crossing interpretation
missing Wilson or form-factor inputs prevent prediction emission

A_FB.definition: forward-backward asymmetry in the lepton angular distribution
A_FB.denominator: D_FB(q^2), corresponding positive-rate normalization when defined

dB_dq2.definition: differential branching fraction placeholder requiring lifetime and normalization convention

dGamma_dq2.definition: differential decay rate with respect to q^2
